_comment: Base vuln-class checklist per engagement type, ORDERED high-to-low expected impact (list order = priority). next_move.py / Skill(coverage): applicable = base[type] + classes implied by matched playbook fingerprints, with gaps surfaced in this order so high-severity untested classes come first (a class is tested when it has a killchain.md 4a row with status [x]). next_move.py emits the top untested base classes as low-ranked [gap] floor moves (below every concrete lead) so systematic breadth always reaches the shortlist even with no fingerprint match. Edit to fit your methodology; keep each set complete, reorder to retune priority.
